mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.fact_payments ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, customer_id, amount, currency, payment_method, gateway_transaction_id, gateway_name, gateway_response, retry_count, failure_reason, state_id, flow_id, created_time, last_modified_time ) SELECT p.id, p.tenant, NOW(), p.order_id, p.customer_id, COALESCE(p.amount, 0), COALESCE(p.currency, 'INR'), p.payment_method, p.gateway_transaction_id, p.gateway_name, p.gateway_response, COALESCE(p.retry_count, 0), p.failure_reason, p.state_id, p.flow_id, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM hm_payment.payment p
mapper.update: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_customer (customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, last_synced_at) SELECT u.id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), NOW() FROM hm_user.user_profiles u WHERE u.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM hm_payment.payment WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL) ON CONFLICT (customer_id) DO UPDATE SET customer_name = EXCLUDED.customer_name, customer_email = EXCLUDED.customer_email, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at

INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_payment_method (method_code, method_display_name, method_type, last_synced_at) SELECT DISTINCT p.payment_method, COALESCE(p.payment_method, ''), COALESCE(p.payment_method, ''), NOW() FROM hm_payment.payment p WHERE p.payment_method IS NOT NULL ON CONFLICT (method_code) DO UPDATE SET method_display_name = EXCLUDED.method_display_name, method_type = EXCLUDED.method_type, last_synced_at = EXCLUDED.last_synced_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.payment_refunds_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, payment_id, amount, reason, status, created_time ) SELECT pr.id, p.tenant, NOW(), pr.payment_id, pr.amount, pr.reason, pr.status, pr.created_time FROM hm_payment.payment_refunds pr JOIN hm_payment.payment p ON pr.payment_id = p.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.payment_webhook_log_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, payment_id, event_type, provider, status, created_time ) SELECT wl.id, p.tenant, NOW(), wl.payment_id, wl.event_type, wl.provider, wl.status, wl.created_time FROM hm_payment.payment_webhook_log wl JOIN hm_payment.payment p ON wl.payment_id = p.id WHERE wl.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
